# SOURCE: Scaling FB Ads for Success (SFAS)

> **Pessoa:** Jon Loomer + Andrew Foxwell
> **Tipo:** MASTERCLASS
> **Ano:** 2018
> **Source ID:** JL-SFAS
> **Arquivos:** 7 (2 audio transcriptions + 2 slide decks + 1 checklist + 2 text transcriptions)
> **Tamanho total:** ~440KB
> **Versão:** 1.0.0
> **Processado em:** 2026-03-27

---

## CONTEÚDO

### Session 1: Scaling Fundamentals (March 27, 2018)
- **Duração:** 1:43:56
- **Formato:** Webinar ao vivo com Q&A
- **Tópicos:**
  1. Scaling Overview
  2. Horizontal vs. Vertical Scaling
  3. Industry Advice on Scaling
  4. Common Problems / Common Mistakes
  5. The Dreaded Learning Phase
  6. The Numbers Game (financial calculations)
  7. Successful Account Structures
  8. Grouping vs. Separating Audiences
  9. Audience Overlap
  10. Adding Multiple Objectives
  11. Naming Conventions
  12. Homework + Q&A

### Session 2: Advanced Scaling Techniques (March 29, 2018)
- **Duração:** 1:28:58
- **Formato:** Webinar ao vivo com Q&A
- **Tópicos:**
  1. Feedback & Questions from Session 1
  2. Session 1 Recap
  3. More Prospecting Recommendations (advanced audiences)
  4. Dynamic Product Ads for Remarketing (upsell/cross-sell)
  5. Destinations (landing page mapping)
  6. Cranking Up Creative & Copy
  7. Recommended Placements for Expansion
  8. Bidding & Budgeting for Scale
  9. Seasoned Pixel
  10. Stopping & Restarting
  11. Geoexpansion for Scale
  12. Reporting
  13. Automated Rules
  14. The Big Dogs (case studies)
  15. Homework + Q&A

### PDF: Scaling Checklist
- 4-Phase checklist with actionable items per phase
- Phase 1: Foundation, Phase 2: Expansion, Phase 3: Advanced, Phase 4: Optimization

### PDF: Session 1 Slides (93 slides)
- Complete slide deck covering all Session 1 topics

### PDF: Session 2 Slides (93 slides)
- Complete slide deck covering all Session 2 topics

## KEY FRAMEWORKS DESTACADOS

### 4-Phase Scaling Checklist (FW-JL-001)
A structured progression from foundation to optimization with specific actions per phase.

### Horizontal Scaling Architecture (FW-JL-002)
Simultaneous expansion of audiences + offers + objectives + creative.

### Remarketing Rework System (FW-JL-003)
Replace simple 30-day remarketing with multi-window, multi-copy segmented approach.

### Social Proofing System (FW-JL-008)
PPE-first approach to build social proof, then transfer Post ID to conversion campaigns.

### DPA Complexity Progression (FW-JL-009)
4-level progression from simple remarketing to broadmatch prospecting.

---

## NOTAS

- Treinamento é de 2018 — some Facebook-specific features have changed (Relevance Score → Quality Ranking, some bidding options)
- Principles of horizontal scaling, audience management, and financial discipline are timeless
- Andrew Foxwell contributes significantly — his agency experience with 200+ coaching calls adds practical depth
- Very e-commerce focused but explicitly states principles apply to B2B and lead gen
